name: Resmo
description: Resmo — Asset and configuration tracking platform querying AWS, GCP, GitHub, and SaaS environments for security posture.

seo.title: Resmo — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: Resmo: Resmo — Asset and configuration tracking platform querying AWS, GCP, GitHub, and SaaS environments for security posture.

when_to_use: Cloud asset inventory across AWS, GCP, and Azure accounts
GitHub repository security posture scanning and query
SaaS security configuration audit for Okta and Slack
CSPM policy violation alerting for cloud compliance
SOC 2 asset coverage evidence via automated config tracking

pros: Query cloud and SaaS configs with SQL-style syntax
Fast setup for small security teams
Catches misconfigurations across AWS, GCP, GitHub, SaaS
Pricing friendly for startups and mid-market
cons: Limited depth versus full CSPM platforms
Fewer built-in controls than Wiz or Orca
Remediation workflows are thin, mostly alerting
Smaller vendor means narrower roadmap velocity
review.verdict: Lightweight asset and misconfig visibility for teams that can't afford enterprise CSPM.
review.best_for: Startups and mid-market teams wanting broad SaaS and cloud config visibility cheaply.
review.not_for: Enterprises needing deep CSPM, CWPP, or integrated CNAPP functionality.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
